artifacts.description: Formula-driven autoscaling diagnosis workbook with inputs, model, sensitivity, remediation combinations, and checks.
Review-ready SRE action plan tied to embedded packet evidence and budget constraints.

validation: Only embedded packet values are used.
All option combinations are checked against remediation_budget_usd=25000.
Sensitivity scenarios cover +/-5% inputs, weights, and threshold.
Workbook formulas are included with cached values and full recalculation on open.

output_summary: Normalized actual outputs from artifact files.
artifacts_excluded_reason: Generated output artifacts are excluded from the public seed dataset by default.
logs_excluded_reason: Raw runner logs are excluded from the public seed dataset.
